freeInsider.title: Free first sourcing check
freeInsider.slogan: A practical first read from Agent Huang on the China side.
freeInsider.whyFree: I've spent 10 years in the system, and I'm tired of seeing honest Western buyers getting scammed or frustrated. I want to build a relationship first. If I can save you from a bad deal with a 10-minute chat, I've done my job as a friend. If you need me for an on-site audit later, you know where to find me.

included.title: Quick Factory Check
included.body: Send me a link or a name; I will tell you if they look like a real factory or a "bedroom" trader in 5 minutes.

included.title: Cultural & Business Translator
included.body: Confused by a factory's "vague" reply? I translate the real meaning behind their Chinese business talk.

included.title: General Sourcing Advice
included.body: Tips on shipping, local holidays, or market trends. No strings attached.

paidModules.title: Strategic Sourcing & Verification
paidModules.integrator: Supplier due diligence + price negotiation on the ground.
paidModules.focus: Find the right supplier, get the right price — before you send real money.
paidModules.whenToBook: Before you lock terms or pay a large deposit to a new vendor.

bullets.title: Real-world Verification
bullets.body: I don't trust Alibaba photos. I go onsite to verify their actual production capacity and legal DNA.

bullets.title: Price Negotiation
bullets.body: Using local knowledge and native language to cut through middleman markups and secure the best MOQs for you.

bullets.title: Factory vs. Trader
bullets.body: I expose "bedroom" trading companies posing as mega-factories.

paidModules.title: Smart Sample Consolidation
paidModules.focus: Save on freight, kill bad samples early.
paidModules.unit: + freight · (or per item — ask for a batch quote)
paidModules.whenToBook: When you are comparing 2+ suppliers and shipping samples from China is bleeding your margin.

bullets.title: 70% Logistics Saving
bullets.body: Send 5 factory samples to my hub. I combine them into ONE parcel to slash your international freight costs.

bullets.title: Unboxing Reviews
bullets.body: High-res video reviews of every sample before they leave China. If it's trash, we kill it early.

bullets.title: Quality Comparison
bullets.body: Side-by-side analysis to help you pick the winning supplier faster.

paidModules.title: Professional Quality Control (QC)
paidModules.integrator: Pre-shipment inspection + line monitoring + on-site dispute handling.
paidModules.focus: Reject bad goods, reject silent delays — before the 70% balance.
paidModules.whenToBook: Before final payment and before goods leave your supplier — every serious PO should pass this gate.

bullets.title: On-site AQL Inspection
bullets.body: Full check on functionality, packaging, and quantities before you pay the final 70%.

bullets.title: Timeline Monitoring
bullets.body: I'm the "headache" the factory fears. I monitor production lines so they don't miss your shipping date.

bullets.title: Dispute Resolution
bullets.body: If issues are found, I handle the rework negotiation on the factory floor, so you don't have to argue across the ocean.

paidModules.title: E-com Logistics & FBA Prep
paidModules.integrator: FBA prep + consolidated export + private label touches.
paidModules.focus: Shelf-ready, compliant, and branded — without a second project manager.
paidModules.whenToBook: When the PO is done and you need China-side prep + door delivery — tell me volume and channels.

bullets.title: FBA Compliance
bullets.body: Labeling, bagging, and palletizing that meets strict Amazon / Walmart requirements.

bullets.title: Global DDP Shipping
bullets.body: Sea, air, or rail. We handle customs and taxes so your goods arrive shelf-ready.

bullets.title: Private Labeling
bullets.body: Custom inserts, thank-you cards, and branded packaging to build your moat.

trustPillars.title: You pay. I work for you.
trustPillars.body: No factory commissions. No referral kickbacks. The invoice is between you and Huang Sourcing.

trustPillars.title: Zero conflict of interest
trustPillars.body: If the supplier offers me a cut, you will know — and I walk away from that relationship.

trustPillars.title: Evidence you can use
trustPillars.body: Photos, line status, and AQL logic you can forward to your CEO, bank, or lawyer.

trustPillars.title: Fast, flat terms
trustPillars.body: Published prices. 24-hour reporting on standard inspections so you can decide before the wire.

comparisonItems.label: "Free" sourcing agents
comparisonItems.text: Paid under the table by factories. They will not surface defects that hurt their commission.

comparisonItems.label: Huang Sourcing — Agent Huang
comparisonItems.text: 10 years in supply-chain systems. Paid only by you. I report what risks your money — not what makes the supplier happy.

integrity.title: Paid by the buyer. Not by the factory.

proof.title: Buyer feedback from practical cases.
proof.lead: Short, specific outcomes from buyers who needed supplier checks, sample comparison, or pre-shipment evidence.

proofCards.name: David R.
proofCards.message: Agent Huang checked packaging and carton-label photos before we paid the balance. One carton label was wrong, so we asked the supplier to fix it before pickup.

proofCards.name: Sophie M.
proofCards.message: The factory said the order was ready for pickup. The onsite check showed missing cartons and mixed labels, so we delayed collection until the count matched the packing list.

proofCards.name: Marcus T.
proofCards.message: We had four suppliers with similar quotes. Agent Huang compared samples, MOQ details, and factory risk notes, then showed why one supplier was safer for the first order.

reportCta.title: See what your report will look like before you book
reportCta.lead: Photo evidence, defect notes, packaging checks, and practical decision points before paying a supplier.

meta.title: About Agent Huang
meta.description: Ten years in China’s supply chain, Shanghai-based, zero factory commissions. Why Agent Huang built Huang Sourcing.

About.tagline: Agent Huang helps overseas buyers verify suppliers, inspect products, compare quotes, and coordinate shipments before money is sent or goods leave China.
About.s1Body: I work with overseas buyers, small importers, marketplace sellers, and first-time China buyers who need someone on the ground to check suppliers, products, packaging, and shipment readiness. The goal is simple: make the risk visible before you pay the deposit, final balance, or freight bill.
About.s2Before: I review supplier claims, compare quotes, check factory signals, visit warehouses or production sites when needed, inspect products, document packaging and labels, and communicate with factories in Chinese. The work is practical, physical, and evidence-based:
About.s2Highlight: real photos, real findings, clear next steps.
About.s3Intro: I have spent years inside China’s supply-chain and cross-border e-commerce systems. I saw how easily overseas buyers can be pushed toward the wrong supplier, unclear pricing, weak samples, or rushed shipments when nobody is physically checking the work for them.
About.s3First: Huang Sourcing exists to give buyers a China-side partner who is paid by the buyer, not the factory.
About.s3Second: That keeps the incentive simple: if something looks risky, I tell you before it becomes your shipment problem.
About.s4Body: Send the supplier name, product, factory location, target order value, and deadline. I will tell you whether a desk check is enough, whether an onsite visit makes sense, and what evidence you should ask for before the next payment. Standard inspection reports target a 24-hour turnaround after the onsite work is complete.
About.cta: Need a second pair of eyes before you pay a Chinese supplier? Send the context and Agent Huang will help you choose the safest next step.
About.locationNote: Strategically based in Shanghai—the heart of East China’s manufacturing and export engine. Nationwide travel for inspections and factory work.
About.portraitAlt: Agent Huang — founder of Huang Sourcing
About.contextImageAlt: Shanghai and China manufacturing context — local hub, national reach
